content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission


September 8, 1989


Anthony N. Ray
Stoker for Supervisor
1001 S. Broadway Street
Santa Maria, CA 93454

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-89-479

Dear Mr. Ray:

You have requested confirmation of my telephone advice
provided to you concerning the campaign disclosure provisions of
the Political Reform Act (Government Code Sections 81000-91015).

Your letter, received August 9, 1989, correctly summarizes my
advice that a candidate who receives a contribution from a
corporation's Los Angeles checking account on behalf of the
corporation's branch in Santa Maria, can report on the campaign
disclosure statement the Santa Maria address. A copy of your
letter is enclosed for your convenience.

Please contact me at (916) 322-5662 if you have additional
questions.

Sincerely,


Kathryn E. Donovan
General Counsel


By: Alice Hughes
Political Reform Consultant

Enclosure




428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660

STOKER FOR SUPERVISOR

AUG 9 2 54 PM '89

Fair Political Practices Commission
Att: Alice Hughes
428 J Street
Sacramento, Ca 95814

Dear Ms. Hughes,

This letter is to confirm the conclusions of our phone
conversation on June 16, 1989.

When a corporation makes a contribution out of their
Los Angeles checking account on behalf of their branch
operation in Santa Maria, the address for filing purposes can be the Santa Maria address.

Once again, thank you for your help in clarifying this
matter.

Sincerely,

[signature]
Anthony N. Ray
Treasurer

1001 S. Broadway St. • Santa Maria, CA 93454 • (805) 928-7492
Stoker for Supervisor, Campaign I.D. No. 890596, Tony Ray, Treasurer

August 21, 1989


Anthony N. Ray
Treasurer
Stoker for Supervisor
1001 S. Broadway St.
Santa Maria, CA 93454

Re: Letter No. 89-479

Dear Mr. Ray:

We received your letter requesting confirmation of advice
under the Political Reform Act on August 9, 1989. Your letter has
been assigned to our Technical Assistance and Analysis Division
for response. If you have any questions, you may contact that
division directly at (916) 322-5662.

If the letter is appropriate for confirmation without further
analysis, we will attempt to expedite our response. A confirming
response will be released after it has gone through our approval
process. If the letter is not appropriate for this treatment, the
staff person assigned to prepare the response will contact you
shortly to advise you. In such cases, the normal analysis, review
and approval process will be followed.

You should be aware that your letter and our response are
public records which may be disclosed to any interested person
upon receipt of a proper request for disclosure.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan
General Counsel

KED:plh:confadvl

STOKER FOR SUPERVISOR

Sacramento, Ca 95814

poses can be the Santa Maria address.

Once again, thank you for your help in clarifying this

Sincerely,

Anthony N. Ray
Treasurer

1001 S. Broadway St. • Santa Maria, CA 93454 • (805) 928-7492
Stoker for Supervisor, Campaign I.D. No. 890595, Tony Ray, Treasurer
